entries.summary: Fixed training notebook: replaced tiny MBPP (374 examples) with CodeSearchNet Python (2M snippets, streaming). Fixed conversation loading to use Dataset.from_list() instead of broken load_dataset('json', data=...).
entries.details: Notebook at P:\aura-book\backend\training\deepseek_coder_arabic.ipynb. Model: deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-instruct. Quran: ReySajju742/Quran (62K rows). Code: code_search_net/python (streaming, 15K sampled). Conversation: teknium/OpenHermes-2.5 (streaming, 15K sampled). Use Dataset.from_list() for in-memory data instead of load_dataset('json', data=...).
entries.code:
code_ds = load_dataset("code_search_net", "python", split="train", streaming=True)
convo_ds = Dataset.from_list(convo_samples)
decisions: MBPP too small (374 examples) - use CodeSearchNet Python instead
load_dataset('json', data=...) broken in newer datasets - use Dataset.from_list()
Stream big datasets, sample 15K each, convert to Dataset.from_list()
